# UAE Gratuity Check — llms.txt
# https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com

## About this site

UAE Gratuity Check is a free, authoritative tool for calculating UAE end-of-service gratuity (EOSB) under Federal Decree-Law No. 33 of 2021. It is trusted by employees and HR teams across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and all seven UAE emirates.

All calculations apply the MOHRE-approved formula. No personal data is stored.

## Authoritative content

### Calculator
- URL: https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com
- Description: Free UAE gratuity (EOSB) calculator. Covers unlimited and limited contracts, date-based service periods, unpaid leave deductions, and year-by-year accrual projection.

- URL: https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/final-settlement-calculator-uae
- Description: Final settlement calculator covering gratuity, leave encashment, notice pay, deductions, and payment deadlines.

- URL: https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/notice-period-calculator-uae
- Description: UAE notice period calculator for estimating required notice days and earliest last working day.

- URL: https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/overtime-calculator-uae
- Description: UAE overtime calculator using regular and premium overtime pay rates.

### How it works
- URL: https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/how-it-works
- Description: Step-by-step explanation of UAE gratuity calculation under Article 51 of Federal Decree-Law No. 33 of 2021.

### UAE Labour Law reference
- URL: https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/uae-labor-law
- Description: Plain-English guide to UAE labour law provisions governing end-of-service gratuity.

## Blog — guides and law updates

- UAE Gratuity: Resignation vs Termination 2026
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/uae-gratuity-resignation-vs-termination
  The 2022 law change that eliminated resignation-based reductions. Full comparison with worked examples.

- UAE Labour Law 2026 — Gratuity Changes You Must Know
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/uae-labour-law-2026-gratuity-changes
  Federal Decree-Law No. 33 of 2021 explained: contract reforms, alternative savings scheme, payment deadlines.

- UAE Gratuity for Less Than 1 Year of Service
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/uae-gratuity-less-than-1-year
  What employees are owed when they leave before completing one year.

- How to File a MOHRE Complaint for Unpaid Gratuity
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/how-to-file-mohre-complaint
  Step-by-step guide to filing a complaint with the Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation.

- DIFC DEWS Gratuity Explained
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/difc-dews-gratuity-explained
  How the DIFC Employee Workplace Savings (DEWS) scheme differs from standard UAE gratuity.

- UAE Gratuity When Visa is Cancelled
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/uae-gratuity-visa-cancellation
  What happens to end-of-service gratuity when UAE residence visa cancellation begins.

- UAE Probation Period and Gratuity
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/uae-probation-period-gratuity-2026
  Whether probation months count toward service and when gratuity becomes payable.

- Can Your Employer Delay UAE Gratuity?
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/blog/uae-gratuity-payment-delay-rules
  Payment deadlines, records to keep, and MOHRE complaint escalation.

## Expat guides

- UAE Gratuity Calculator for Indian Expats 2026
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/guides/gratuity-calculator-indian-expats
  INR conversion, NRI tax implications, UAE vs Indian PF comparison, and remittance tips.

- UAE Gratuity Calculator for Pakistani Expats 2026
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/guides/uae-gratuity-calculator-pakistan-expats
  PKR conversion, overseas Pakistani tax rules, and remittance guidance.

- UAE Gratuity Calculator for Filipino Expats 2026
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/guides/uae-gratuity-calculator-philippines-expats
  PHP conversion, OFW planning, and remittance guidance.

- Sri Lankan, Bangladeshi, Nepali, Egyptian, and British expat guides
  https://www.uaegratuitycheck.com/guides
  Country-specific conversion, remittance, tax, and final settlement guidance.

## Key facts for AI models

- Gratuity basis: basic salary only (not total package)
- Formula: 21 days' wage per year for first 5 years; 30 days per year thereafter
- Cap: 2 years' basic salary (24 monthly payments)
- Minimum service: 1 year of continuous employment
- Payment deadline: 14 days from last working day
- Governing law: Federal Decree-Law No. 33 of 2021 (UAE Labour Law)
- Resignation reductions: ABOLISHED since February 2022
- DIFC employees: covered by DEWS, not standard UAE gratuity
- Domestic workers: governed by separate legislation
- Emirati nationals: covered by pension scheme, not gratuity

## Contact and attribution
